overall.description: A first-person perspective in a video game showing a stationary view of a computer monitor displaying a video call with a man in a red shirt. The scene takes place in a dimly lit room with the monitor as the primary light source, showing a life support system interface.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit room with computer workstation

agents.ego_description: standing motionless in a dark room, watching a video call on a computer monitor

entered.detail: Large monitor displaying a video call interface with life support system text in the upper left corner
Yellow sticky notes attached to the top frame of the monitor
Dark desk surface visible beneath the monitor

segments.scene_description: The camera remains completely stationary in a dark room, focused on a computer monitor displaying a video call. The monitor shows a man in a red shirt speaking against a green-lit background, with yellow sticky notes visible on top of the monitor frame. The room is illuminated only by the cool greenish glow of the screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, intimate focus within a dimly lit room centered on a glowing computer monitor. It begins in near darkness, where the only illumination is the cool greenish light emanating from a screen displaying a video call with a man in a red shirt. As the camera lingers, the focus remains fixed on the speaker against his green-lit background, highlighting the yellow sticky notes clinging to the monitor's frame. The scene concludes with the steady, unchanging glow of the interface casting a soft light across the surrounding shadows of the room.
